targets.visualRule: Calm, low-contrast pond water with two subtle value variants; must not compete with shoreline decor or actors. The shimmer clip is a gentle, small-amplitude highlight ripple, not a bright animated effect.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.

This is the project's first animated-terrain-tile precedent (a looping clip on a terrain tile, distinct from the static neighbor-blending in Section 13 and the same-cell state swap used by tile_farm_tilled_soil). Implementing the loop at runtime (e.g. a Tiled animated tile or a lightweight Phaser texture-swap) is deferred to map-integration work; this target adds no runtime animation.

targets.visualRule: Grass-to-water blend set following the same full reduced 13-tile approach as tile_farm_path_dirt (contract Section 13): 1 center + 4 edges + 4 outer corners (corner_*) + 4 inner corners (inner_corner_*), authored for Tiled's Terrain Brush. Edges must read as a soft sandy/mossy transition band, not a hard grid line. The inner corners are what let the pond read as a natural, irregular, concave shoreline rather than a convex rectangular pool.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
Shares the full reduced 13-tile blend precedent (9 outer variants + 4 inner corners) with tile_farm_path_dirt; do not author a full 47-tile blob set.

targets.visualRule: Small floating lily pad decal placed on tile_farm_water_base; must not fill the cell (Stardew-caliber scatter rule: sparse, off-center, roughly 40-50% cell occupancy) or read as a second competing tile grid.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.

targets.visualRule: Small water-surface flower cluster (e.g. water lily blossom), sparse and off-center like tile_farm_water_lily; two color variants for visual rhythm without a third competing grid.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.

targets.visualRule: Small wet-look rock cluster sitting at the shoreline edge, low profile (no meaningful height above the tile plane per Section 4a); reads as a landmark accent, not a repeated stamp.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
Whether this becomes a solid obstacle is a Phase 3 map-integration decision; this target adds no collision behavior.

targets.visualRule: Tall, thin edge plant using the flattened 'pop-up book' perspective (Section 4a): canvas extends upward from the 16x16 footprint rather than lying flat on the ground plane. Placed along shoreline edges between water and grass.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
Whether reeds render in decals_low or need actors_body Y-sorting against a nearby player is deferred to Phase 3 map-integration.
